name: AniWorld Multi-Site Downloader
description: Search, browse, and download anime and series from aniworld.to, s.to, aniwatch.one, and animex.one directly within Jellyfin. Supports VOE, Filemoon, Vidoza, and Vidmoly providers with multiple language options including English Dub and English Sub.
overview: Download anime from aniworld.to, s.to, aniwatch.one, and animex.one directly within Jellyfin

versions.changelog:
v1.9.0.0
- Fix: animex.one search, popular, and new releases now use GraphQL/REST API (was broken SPA scraping)
- Fix: aniwatch.one search and browse regex patterns fixed for current site HTML structure

v1.8.2.0
- Fix: manifest now uses MD5 checksum (compatible with Jellyfin 10.11)
- Fix: removed non-standard targetAbi from plugin-level manifest field

v1.8.1.0
- Fix: aniwatch.one and animex.one now included in combined search ("All Sources")
- Fix: build output now includes all dependency DLLs for manual install
- Add: GitHub Actions workflow for automated builds and releases
- Add: Jellyfin plugin repository manifest for catalog-based installation

v1.8.0.0
- Replaced mkissa.to, miruro.to, and anime.nexus with aniwatch.one and animex.one
- aniwatch.one: full server-rendered HTML scraping (search, series info, episodes, providers)
- animex.one: SvelteKit SPA support with JSON-LD metadata extraction and AniList ID integration
- Both new sites support English Sub and English Dub with VOE, Filemoon, Vidmoly, and Vidoza providers

v1.7.0.0
- Added support for 3 new sites: mkissa.to, miruro.to, and anime.nexus (English Dub & Sub focused)
- New English Dub/Sub focused language mappings for English-centric sites
- Per-site configuration for all 6 supported streaming sites

v1.6.1.0
- Added language fallback. Thanks to Alexius25 on GitHub
- Removed remaining dead HiAnime code
- Removed: FlareSolverr integration. s.to has moved its provider redirector behind a Cloudflare Turnstile widget that activates per-IP for flagged egress addresses. FlareSolverr cannot solve embedded Turnstile widgets that require user interaction, so the integration was not actually helping affected users. If your server's IP is gated, route the plugin's outbound traffic through a clean proxy via the existing Proxy Server setting (SOCKS5 / HTTP supported).

v1.6.0.0
- Feature: Movie download support for s.to and aniworld.to (#17, thanks @Alexius25)
- Feature: Force option to re-download episodes already marked as downloaded
- Feature: SOCKS5 / HTTP proxy support for outbound traffic to streaming sites
- Feature: Manual "Rebuild download history" scheduled task to resync the database with files on disk
- Fix: Movie detection and downloading reliability
- Fix: Removed legacy scheduled task that was a no-op
- Note: This release also shipped an optional FlareSolverr integration that was removed in v1.6.1.0. See its changelog for details.

v1.5.3.0
- Feature: Configurable s.to base URL in plugin settings -- use an alternative domain (e.g. serienstream.to) if s.to is blocked by your ISP
- Fix: ffmpeg not found on Windows servers with custom Jellyfin install locations -- removed hardcoded fallback paths in favor of Jellyfin's configured ffmpeg path

v1.5.1.0
- Feature: Maintenance mode to block users from adding episodes to queue
- Feature: Priority queueing for downloads
- Feature: Display user and language for queue elements
- Feature: Better formatted statistics in history view
- Fix: Priority queue not properly displaying in the UI
- Fix: Disabled HiAnime support (service discontinuing)
- Fix: Removed bad symbols from filenames
- Fix: Build error from misplaced constant declaration
- Code cleanup: Extracted magic numbers into named constants

v1.5.0.0
- Feature: HiAnime.to support for English dubbed anime
- Feature: Sidebar access for non-admin users via File Transformation plugin
- Feature: Separated download paths per language
- Feature: Option to disable English-sub downloads for HiAnime and AniWorld
- Feature: Option to force English-dub only downloads for HiAnime
- Feature: HiAnime download merging for more accurate downloads
- Fix: HiAnime wrong episode file naming
- Fix: User downloader panel not responding if admin panel was used before
- Fix: Narrowed folder selection for HiAnime to only HiAnime-accessible titles
- Fix: Hidden irrelevant Download All button for HiAnime source titles
- Fix: Various stability improvements
